news.title:
Bajaj Finance Ltd confirms redemption of INR 2,000 crore Commercial Paper on 5 March 2026.
The redemption complies with SEBI's Master Circular for CP issuance and listing.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance Ltd confirms redemption of INR 2,000 crore Commercial Paper on 5 March 2026.
The redemption complies with SEBI's Master Circular for CP issuance and listing.

news.title:
Bernstein maintains an Underperform rating on Bajaj Finance.
The target price is raised to 840 from 750.
news.summary:
Bernstein maintains an Underperform rating on Bajaj Finance.
The target price is raised to 840 from 750.

news.title:
Q3FY26 shows strong NBFC growth with improved portfolio quality.
Lower bond yields reduce financing costs, driving margin expansion for NBFCs.
news.summary:
Q3FY26 shows strong NBFC growth with improved portfolio quality.
Lower bond yields reduce financing costs, driving margin expansion for NBFCs.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance allotted 2.5 lakh secured NCDs worth Rs. 2,500.2 crore via private placement.
Tenures are 1116 & 1826 days with annual coupon rates of 7.4% & 7.55%. Listed on BSE Debt Market.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance allotted 2.5 lakh secured NCDs worth Rs. 2,500.2 crore via private placement.
Tenures are 1116 & 1826 days with annual coupon rates of 7.4% & 7.55%. Listed on BSE Debt Market.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv plans a $1B alternative investment platform, expanding beyond lending, mutual funds, and insurance.
The platform will focus on private equity, venture capital, listed equity, and real estate.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv plans a $1B alternative investment platform, expanding beyond lending, mutual funds, and insurance.
The platform will focus on private equity, venture capital, listed equity, and real estate.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance executed a Rs. 499.3 crore NSE block trade for ~4.88M shares.
Shares were priced at Rs. 1022.1 each in the significant transaction.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance executed a Rs. 499.3 crore NSE block trade for ~4.88M shares.
Shares were priced at Rs. 1022.1 each in the significant transaction.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance Ltd has redeemed commercial paper worth ₹1,775 crore on February 18, 2026.
The redemption aligns with SEBI regulations and issuance terms.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance Ltd has redeemed commercial paper worth ₹1,775 crore on February 18, 2026.
The redemption aligns with SEBI regulations and issuance terms.

news.title:
Leading NBFCs like Tata Capital, Bajaj Finance, and L&T Finance adopt AI for acquisition, underwriting, and servicing.
AI adoption drives business growth and enhances cost efficiency across the lending value chain.
news.summary:
Leading NBFCs like Tata Capital, Bajaj Finance, and L&T Finance adopt AI for acquisition, underwriting, and servicing.
AI adoption drives business growth and enhances cost efficiency across the lending value chain.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley adds Bharti Airtel to Focus Lists, replacing Bajaj Finance.
Bharti Airtel favored for strong execution, robust cash flow; ARPU growth & EBITDA projected positive.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley adds Bharti Airtel to Focus Lists, replacing Bajaj Finance.
Bharti Airtel favored for strong execution, robust cash flow; ARPU growth & EBITDA projected positive.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance leverages AI to process 20 mn calls, targeting 100 mn next year, enhancing sales, service, and DMS functions.
AI initiatives include 2.7L videos, 1.2L banners, 11 text bots, and identity control for 46 mn face matches; loan disbursements via AI reached Rs 1,600 cr.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance leverages AI to process 20 mn calls, targeting 100 mn next year, enhancing sales, service, and DMS functions.
AI initiatives include 2.7L videos, 1.2L banners, 11 text bots, and identity control for 46 mn face matches; loan disbursements via AI reached Rs 1,600 cr.

news.title: Bajaj Finance reports strong core growth, though provisions impact results.
news.summary: Bajaj Finance reports strong core growth, though provisions impact results.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance faces impact in Q3 due to accelerated ECL provisions.
Management forecasts FY26 growth at 22%.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance faces impact in Q3 due to accelerated ECL provisions.
Management forecasts FY26 growth at 22%.

news.title:
HDFC Securities maintains 'Buy' on Bajaj Finance; revised target price is Rs 1,070.
Bajaj Finance Q3 PAT declined 6% YoY due to Rs 1,400 cr provisioning.
news.summary:
HDFC Securities maintains 'Buy' on Bajaj Finance; revised target price is Rs 1,070.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance to announce FY27 AUM growth guidance with Q4 results.
FY26 AUM growth forecast at 21-22% due to slower MSME sector and end of two-wheeler financing.

Profit impacted due to one-off charges, as reported by ET Now.

The company also issued revised guidance, impacting market sentiment.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv Q3 net profit at ₹22.3 billion; revenue from ops ₹397.1 billion.
Q3 includes a one-time charge of ₹3.8 billion owing to new labour codes.
news.summary:
